title: Production Hardening + Multi-Agent Ops
summary: Today’s cycle points to enterprise hardening (security/evals), multi-agent coding workflows, and continued acceleration across US + China AI ecosystems.

items.headline: OpenAI News Hub
items.note: Official source for releases and platform updates; use as primary verification point before secondary media.

items.note: Signals continued capex pressure and infrastructure race among frontier labs.

items.headline: Reuters: low-cost Chinese model wave
items.note: Useful macro signal: pricing pressure and capability uplift likely to continue through 2026.

items.headline: Bloomberg: DeepSeek API access update
items.note: API availability and pricing shifts matter for fallback-provider strategy.

items.headline: OpenClaw docs
items.note: Daily-AI pipeline now supports richer source ingestion; Perplexity key stored as optional expansion lane.

items.headline: OpenClaw GitHub
items.note: Track upstream capability changes and add relevant updates to daily brief structure.

implementation: For our stack: add a Daily-AI quality gate that requires at least one official source per major claim, and pilot a weekly 'apply now' lane where one trend is converted into an actionable experiment in our active projects.

title: Kickoff Edition
summary: Project launched. Automated feed pipeline is ready; web-wide search is now configured and can be expanded in next refresh.
